analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet says COVID-19 shows our interconnectedness and the necessity of multilateral cooperation; it urges joining efforts for global solutions, tied to the International Day of Multilateralism and Diplomacy for Peace. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – Not referenced; no historical EU successes or lessons. EU2 (EU united) – No mention of EU unity or intra-EU solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not about EU policies for EU citizens; it's global/multilateral. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – No claim of EU pioneering regulation or leadership. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – No explicit defense of democracy/human rights; focus is cooperation, not rights advocacy. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – The message promotes multilateralism and global cooperation for common challenges, which aligns with portraying the EU (implicitly, given the context of EU narratives) as supporting and contributing to global solutions and multilateralism. Conclusion: Only EU6 applies.
